narration: Mars once thrived with a thick atmosphere... so what happened?
visual_description: Hook visual: Mars once thrived with a thick atmosphere... so what happened?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Mars once thrived with a thick atmosphere... so what happened?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Mars once thrived with a thick atmosphere... so what happened?

narration: Unlike Earth, Mars has a weak magnetic shield. This made it vulnerable to solar winds.
visual_description: Context visual: Unlike Earth, Mars has a weak magnetic shield. This made it vulnerable to solar winds.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Unlike Earth, Mars has a weak magnetic shield. This made it vulnerable to solar winds.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Unlike Earth, Mars has a weak magnetic shield. This made it vulnerable to solar winds.

narration: Solar winds stripped away essential particles, leading to a thinning atmosphere over millions of years.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Solar winds stripped away essential particles, leading to a thinning atmosphere over millions of years.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Solar winds stripped away essential particles, leading to a thinning atmosphere over millions of years.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Solar winds stripped away essential particles, leading to a thinning atmosphere over millions of years.

narration: Adding to the problem, low gravity makes it hard for Mars to hold onto lighter gases.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Adding to the problem, low gravity makes it hard for Mars to hold onto lighter gases.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Adding to the problem, low gravity makes it hard for Mars to hold onto lighter gases.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Adding to the problem, low gravity makes it hard for Mars to hold onto lighter gases.

narration: With these forces combined, Mars lost its thick atmosphere, leaving a barren landscape.
visual_description: Payoff visual: With these forces combined, Mars lost its thick atmosphere, leaving a barren landscape.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: With these forces combined, Mars lost its thick atmosphere, leaving a barren landscape.
